PrigeeX brand identity system - all SVG and raster assets sharing the signature crossing-X motif, deep navy palette (#0B2A6B/#03102E), and brand blue (#1670E8), forming a coherent multi-format brand system covering favicon, inline mark, square logo, solid mark, wordmark lockup, and PNG export.

nodes.norm_label: illustrative/mock data pattern for unreleased features

nodes.label: React Context Provider pattern for cross-component state
nodes.norm_label: react context provider pattern for cross-component state

nodes.label: Generic file icon SVG - a small 16x16 document/file glyph in gray (#666), used as a generic UI file-type indicator (e.g. in file pickers or directory listings). Not a brand asset.
nodes.norm_label: generic file icon svg - a small 16x16 document/file glyph in gray (#666), used as a generic ui file-type indicator (e.g. in file pickers or directory listings). not a brand asset.

nodes.label: PrigeeX app icon / logo mark (512x512, viewBox 120x120) - rounded-rectangle container with deep navy-to-near-black gradient background (#0B2A6B to #03102E), a radial blue glow overlay, and two crossing diagonal band shapes forming an 'X' motif rendered with multi-stop blue gradients (light sky-blue at top fading to near-black at bottom). Serves as the primary square logo asset in the public root, likely used as the app icon or OG image source.
nodes.norm_label: prigeex app icon / logo mark (512x512, viewbox 120x120) - rounded-rectangle container with deep navy-to-near-black gradient background (#0b2a6b to #03102e), a radial blue glow overlay, and two crossing diagonal band shapes forming an 'x' motif rendered with multi-stop blue gradients (light sky-blue at top fading to near-black at bottom). serves as the primary square logo asset in the public root, likely used as the app icon or og image source.

nodes.label: PrigeeX brand mark as a rasterized PNG - shows the characteristic crossing-X diagonal band motif on a dark navy rounded-rectangle background, rendered in blue gradients. This is the PNG export/fallback of the PrigeeX logo mark, used where SVG is not appropriate (e.g. social previews, app manifests, or legacy contexts).
nodes.norm_label: prigeex brand mark as a rasterized png - shows the characteristic crossing-x diagonal band motif on a dark navy rounded-rectangle background, rendered in blue gradients. this is the png export/fallback of the prigeex logo mark, used where svg is not appropriate (e.g. social previews, app manifests, or legacy contexts).

nodes.label: PrigeeX favicon SVG (256x256, viewBox 120x120) - compact version of the X-mark logo optimized for small sizes: rounded-rectangle with navy gradient background, two crossing diagonal bands in blue gradients, and a single highlight edge stroke. Used as the browser tab favicon and small-format icon.
nodes.norm_label: prigeex favicon svg (256x256, viewbox 120x120) - compact version of the x-mark logo optimized for small sizes: rounded-rectangle with navy gradient background, two crossing diagonal bands in blue gradients, and a single highlight edge stroke. used as the browser tab favicon and small-format icon.

nodes.label: PrigeeX primary logo SVG (1024x1024, viewBox 120x120) - the full-resolution brand mark with rounded rectangle, deep navy-to-black gradient fill, radial blue glow, and the signature crossing-X diagonal band motif with multi-stop blue gradients and edge highlight paths. Canonical high-resolution logo for use in marketing, press kits, and large-format display.
nodes.norm_label: prigeex primary logo svg (1024x1024, viewbox 120x120) - the full-resolution brand mark with rounded rectangle, deep navy-to-black gradient fill, radial blue glow, and the signature crossing-x diagonal band motif with multi-stop blue gradients and edge highlight paths. canonical high-resolution logo for use in marketing, press kits, and large-format display.

nodes.label: PrigeeX solid mark SVG (1024x1024, viewBox 120x120) - simplified flat variant of the logo mark: rounded rectangle filled with a single flat navy (#071D49), and two crossing diagonal X bands in flat blue (#1670E8) with slight opacity variation. Used where gradients are not appropriate (e.g. single-color print, embossing, dark monochrome contexts).
nodes.norm_label: prigeex solid mark svg (1024x1024, viewbox 120x120) - simplified flat variant of the logo mark: rounded rectangle filled with a single flat navy (#071d49), and two crossing diagonal x bands in flat blue (#1670e8) with slight opacity variation. used where gradients are not appropriate (e.g. single-color print, embossing, dark monochrome contexts).

nodes.label: PrigeeX inline X mark SVG (120x120) - the full-gradient logo mark at a compact square size, sharing identical gradient vocabulary (navy background, radial glow, multi-stop blue X bands, edge highlights) with the primary logo. Intended for inline use within UI contexts such as nav bars, headers, or embedded brand stamps.
nodes.norm_label: prigeex inline x mark svg (120x120) - the full-gradient logo mark at a compact square size, sharing identical gradient vocabulary (navy background, radial glow, multi-stop blue x bands, edge highlights) with the primary logo. intended for inline use within ui contexts such as nav bars, headers, or embedded brand stamps.

nodes.label: PrigeeX wordmark SVG (1200x240, viewBox 600x120) - horizontal lockup combining the square X-mark logo (left) with the full brand name 'PrigeeX' as bold text (font-weight 800, Inter/Manrope, letter-spacing -2.5) in near-white (#F4F6F5) with the 'X' character accent-colored in brand blue (#1670E8). Used for horizontal header placements, marketing banners, and contexts requiring the full brand name alongside the mark.
nodes.norm_label: prigeex wordmark svg (1200x240, viewbox 600x120) - horizontal lockup combining the square x-mark logo (left) with the full brand name 'prigeex' as bold text (font-weight 800, inter/manrope, letter-spacing -2.5) in near-white (#f4f6f5) with the 'x' character accent-colored in brand blue (#1670e8). used for horizontal header placements, marketing banners, and contexts requiring the full brand name alongside the mark.
